# ALIGOO DEV STARTER KIT

## CORE STACK
- Next.js App Router
- Sanity.io (Headless CMS)

---

## SANITY CORE
- Fetching Guide:
https://www.sanity.io/docs/app-sdk/fetching-and-handling-content

- GROQ Guide:
https://www.sanity.io/docs/groq

- TypeGen:
https://www.sanity.io/docs/apis-and-sdks/sanity-typegen

---

## BEST PRACTICES

### Fetching Strategy
- Use server-side fetch for main content
- Use ISR (revalidate) for marketing pages
- Avoid client.fetch in components

### API USAGE CONTROL
- Cache all GET queries
- Use CDN: useCdn: true
- Avoid repeated fetch loops

---

## KNOWN RISKS
- Sanity API overuse from webhooks
- Vercel function over-execution

---

## INTERNAL PATTERNS
See:
/patterns/fetching.md
/patterns/caching.md
/patterns/webhooks.md
/patterns/sanity-type-gen.md
